review_history.summary: The values/gaps/conflict fixture tests binding, direct evidence, anti-guessing, blocked derivation, patch overlay, machine-readable gaps, and delta-only harness readiness.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: page/checksum/schema binding and read-only owner inputs are explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: supported 5 V, conflicting current, blocked power derivation, and missing AUX outcomes are deterministic
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: allowed field states and gap/impact/action records cover every unfilled required quantity
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: patch-only overlay and no sidecar/schema replacement are mandatory
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: harness output is delta-only with blockers preserved and final approvals forbidden
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: raw/vendor/private payload, secret, runtime path, golden, and fabricated execution/read risks are gated

no_golden_finding: pass: supplied quantitative facts are scenario inputs and no candidate overlay or expected prose is embedded.
residual_gaps: No sidecar, source packet, XML, overlay, harness, or private output was read, written, or executed.
